message: Jake
Meryl
Oh, you finally managed to schedule something with your daughter?
No, actually I haven't.
Then what on earth did you come here for?
You did come to talk about your daughter, right?
Look
Talk
Listen
Think
Move
System
The surroundings
About my daughter
About the shooting
Thing
About Cindy
To another place
Save
End the game
Is it a simple room for a big-time actress, or is it just elegantly put together?
I can't judge.
There's a famous actress lying in front of me, yet I'm not feeling that excited. She seems to have a poisonous nature.
This room is
a vacation home, right? Is the real house in Beverly Hills or maybe somewhere in Miami?
is clearly irritated by my slow work. She looks like she could throw the glass she’s holding at me any moment.
My evaluation seems to have hit rock bottom. From her expression, it's clear I can read disappointment.
You know, I don't have time to chat with you.
I'm sorry.
I want you to only visit when there's progress on the request.
If you understand, hurry to your daughter.
Have you found her?
Yes.
Then why can't we meet? It's strange.
Well, she has her own circumstances.
Her circumstances? What about my circumstances?
I'll do my best to secure the arrangement as soon as possible.
Not 'as soon as possible', but right away, right? Honestly, you're useless.
Ugh, how long do you plan to keep me waiting?
Filming? That's not relevant right now. You should be figuring something out about our daughter.
It seems I've really upset her because I couldn't make plans with Cindy.
I'm trying my hardest too, and I care about Cindy's feelings.
I wish she could be a bit more patient.
At this rate, I might really be labeled as incompetent. I'm not the only detective,
and I have the financial means to pay a hefty reward.
To Cindy, I'm just a mother who isn't dear or nostalgic just because we're related by blood.
What am I supposed to do now by meeting her? Convincing that girl will be a big task.
Anyway, we can't start without meeting and talking. I'm not very confident, though.
I'll at least try my best.
Next time you come, you must have a talk with our daughter.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
